sn15.12:1.1: At Sāvatthī. "Bhikkhus, this saṁsara is without discoverable beginning … . Whenever you see anyone happy and fortunate, sn.ii.187 you can conclude: ‘We too have experienced the same thing in this long course.’ For what reason? Because, bhikkhus, this saṁsara is without discoverable beginning … . It is enough to be liberated from them."
